facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss. Bagels 'n Eggs is pulling a 4.8 from 643 reviews and the breakfast crowd here is mostly locals and long-stay expats. Not the resort buffet crowd. Fresh bagels in Phu Quoc. Eggs done right. No tourist markup. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the breakfast line fill up at Bagels 'n Eggs. 4.8 stars. 643 reviews. The resort crowd has no idea this street even exists. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where Phu Quoc actually eats.

instagram.caption: Locals aren't posting this breakfast spot. 4.8 stars, 643 reviews, and zero resort tourists inside. Bagels 'n Eggs on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: 643 reviews. The breakfast spot Phu Quoc keeps to itself. Bagels 'n Eggs. Go before the tourists figure it out.
